subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though thou art not present in outward form, and art not visible to the physical eye, in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق هر چند بظاهر حاضر نیستی و بچشم ظاهر ناظر نه که در این
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
